title: USGS Landsat Missions
description: A USGS source card about Landsat satellites and Earth-observation data.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS Landsat resources describe how satellite imagery tracks land cover, agriculture, cities, water, fire scars, and long-term environmental change.
Use this source for interpreting images as evidence, comparing change over time, and asking how technology helps scientists monitor Earth systems.
Landsat data are generally available without copyright restriction, but linked photographs, logos, and partner materials can carry separate usage guidance.
